title: Living World: Seasons & Ecology
description: Living World: Seasons & Ecology dynamically simulates Minecraft’s environment with changing seasons, ecosystem regeneration, and responsive wildlife behavior. Player actions directly impact the world, affecting resource regrowth, animal activity
body:
Living World: Seasons & Ecology – A Dynamic Nature System for Minecraft

Transform your Minecraft server into a truly living world. This plugin introduces a fully simulated ecosystem with changing seasons, responsive wildlife, and environmental events that react to player actions. Crops grow faster in Spring, animals migrate, forests regenerate, and storms, heatwaves, or blights can reshape the landscape. Players’ interactions with the world—overharvesting or restoration—directly influence how biomes thrive or degrade, making every choice impactful. Perfect for survival servers seeking an immersive, ever-evolving environment.
